name: duet-marketplace
description: Two-model consensus (duet): Claude Fable 5 and OpenAI GPT-5.6 iterate to consensus via the duet-bridge connector.

plugins.name: duet
plugins.description: Two-model consensus collaboration. Ships the /duet slash command plus an auto-triggering skill: Claude Fable 5 drafts, OpenAI GPT-5.6 (via the duet-bridge connector) critiques and scores, they iterate to consensus, then an independent verifier signs off. Packaged as a plugin so /duet resolves through the command resolver (unaffected by the personal-skill marketplace-catalog resolver bug).
